items.label: Room type / occupancy
items.hint: Determines lux target, UGR limit, and Ra minimum per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3

items.label: Ceiling height (mm AFF)
items.hint: Above-finished-floor to the underside of the ceiling. Drives mounting height and cavity ratio.

items.label: Luminaire lumen output (lm)
items.hint: State whether this is INITIAL (rated at t=0) or DESIGN/MAINTAINED lumens

items.label: Luminaire circuit wattage (W)
items.hint: Used for Part L efficacy check and circuit loading

items.label: Manufacturer-specific photometric data (override ontology defaults)
items.hint: Optional. Supply when an IES/LDT file is available for the specific luminaire. Generator falls back to ontology/luminaire-types.json defaults if absent.

uf_table_by_ri.description: UF table indexed by room_index string key (e.g. '1.0', '2.0') then reflectance triplet string key (e.g. '0.7_0.5_0.2'). Same shape as ontology[type].photometric.uf_table_by_ri.

_source.description: Citation: manufacturer name + photometric file name + IES/LDT reference

items.label: UK new-build or major refurbishment?
items.hint: Triggers Part L 2021 compliance checks (efficacy, perimeter zoning, daylight-linked dimming)

items.label: Project jurisdiction code
items.hint: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2, e.g. GB, KE, NG, ZA, AE. Drives which national-adoption standard applies.

items.label: Installation environment
items.hint: Drives IP-rating minimum (BS 7671 Section 522) and zone selection (Section 701 for bathrooms)

items.label: Entrance / door positions (wall + offset_mm + door_swing)
items.hint: List of doorways used to place switching per BS 7671 §553.1.1 + IET OSG App E §E1.4. door_swing determines latch side for switch placement.

items.label: Glazed wall / window walls (wall codes)
items.hint: Drives Part L 2021 perimeter daylight-zone separately switched control

items.label: Distribution board designation
items.hint: E.g. DB-L1; links to db-layout + cable-sizing skills

items.label: For each zone, what is its BS EN 12464-1 area classification (task / surrounding / background / circulation)?
items.hint: BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.2.2 + Table 6. If absent, all zones default to purpose=task with em_target_lux derived from room.target_illuminance_lux.

em_target_lux_override.description: Optional explicit override; else derived from Em × ratio.

items.label: For each luminaire, what is the installation mount type?
items.hint: BS EN 60598-2 series. If absent, all luminaires default to mount_type=recessed (v1.6.0 backwards compatible).

items.label: For each pendant or suspended luminaire, what is the suspension drop length from ceiling (mm)?
items.hint: BS EN 60598-2 + manufacturer pendant kit datasheet. Required when mount_type ∈ {pendant, suspended}.
